response: Hi everyone, I’m Casey! I’m a pretty cooperative person who values teamwork and open communication. I like to approach group situations methodically, making sure everyone’s voice is heard while we figure things out together. Looking forward to getting to know all of you!

Hi everyone, I’m Dana! I appreciate clear communication and enjoy working through problems methodically. I’m looking forward to collaborating with all of you and hearing everyone's ideas as we navigate this game together!

Hey everyone, I’m Bailey! I’m super talkative and love engaging with all of you, so let’s keep the energy high as we navigate this game together. I believe in sharing ideas and working as a team to figure out who the Mafia might be—let’s have fun with it!

1. Casey is the biggest threat to Mafia because they emphasize teamwork and open communication, making it likely they'll rally others to identify us.

ACTION: Protect Gray
